scripts.migrate: cd server && npx knex migrate:latest --knexfile knexfile.ts
scripts.seed: cd server && npx knex seed:run --knexfile knexfile.ts
scripts.db:reset: cd server && npx knex migrate:rollback --all --knexfile knexfile.ts && npx knex migrate:latest --knexfile knexfile.ts && npx knex seed:run --knexfile knexfile.ts
